context.objective: Fix the broken test suite so all tests pass. The venv exists but is missing loguru and possibly other dependencies.
acceptance_criteria: All Python dependencies from pyproject.toml are installed in the venv
pytest runs all 5 test files without collection errors
No new dependencies added beyond what pyproject.toml already specifies
constraints: Use the existing .venv — do not create a new virtual environment
Do not modify test files unless they have genuine bugs
Do not modify source code to make tests pass — fix the environment
